overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a futuristic indoor commercial space with glass displays, transitioning to a small private room with a vending machine, then cutting to the exterior of the Sunset Motel at night, exploring the parking lot and upper walkway, and finally entering a neon-lit bar interior with retro styling.

walking while wearing a purple jacket

large illuminated advertisement screen
massive display with white M logo and scenic imagery
metal elevator doors with illuminated frame
recessed lighting creating dramatic pools of light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic indoor commercial space with polished marble floors and dramatic overhead lighting. The camera moves forward past NPCs browsing glass display cases and digital signage, heading toward a large wall screen and elevator doors at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: small private room with vending machine and towels

interface appears for interacting with the floor-mounted vending machine

agents.ego_description: entering a compact room and approaching a red vending machine on the floor

notable_agents.action: standing near the wall wearing a turquoise patterned shirt and red pants

entered.detail: red and white floor-mounted vending machine with illuminated interface
rack with multiple white towels hanging
dark countertop with sink basin
dark wooden seating along the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a small, dimly lit private room with wooden floors and white towels hanging on the left wall. An NPC in colorful clothing stands near the back as the camera approaches a red medical vending machine, triggering an interaction interface.

scene_state.functional_zone: motel parking lot with large illuminated signage

events.description: hard cut to exterior night scene of the Sunset Motel

agents.ego_description: approaching the motel building and circling around the parking lot perimeter

entered.detail: large illuminated dome sign with SUNSET text in orange neon
two-story building with multiple doors and balconies
tall pole with bright overhead lamp
cracked asphalt surface with parking lines and debris
scattered trash and construction materials

segments.scene_description: The scene abruptly transitions to a foggy night exterior, facing the iconic Sunset Motel with its massive glowing dome sign. The camera walks across the cracked asphalt parking lot, passing street lamps and debris, then turns right to follow the building's perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior metal staircase and second-floor walkway

events.description: beginning to ascend the exterior metal staircase to the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal stairs and walking along the second-floor exterior walkway

entered.detail: open metal staircase with grated steps and blue railings
blue painted metal safety railing along the walkway
illuminated vending machine on the exterior walkway
overhanging roof structure covering the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the exterior metal staircase to the second floor, revealing a covered walkway with corrugated roofing. The motel building now appears on the left with individual room doors visible, while a vending machine stands illuminated on the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: retro diner bar with neon signage and American flag decor

events.description: entering the bar interior from the exterior walkway

agents.ego_description: entering the bar and moving past seating areas toward the counter

notable_agents.action: sitting at a table eating near the American flag wall

entered.detail: long counter with stools and warm backlighting
red cushioned stools lined up at the counter
large flag with single star hanging on the wall
green vending machine with BURRITO text in red neon
pink and blue neon light sculpture of bottles
multiple concert posters including SAMURAI and other bands

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a warmly lit bar interior from the walkway, revealing a retro-styled space with an American flag, neon bottle signs, and band posters on the walls. A green burrito vending machine stands near the entrance while red bar stools line the counter, and an NPC sits at a nearby table.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a sterile, high-tech commercial interior into the gritty, neon-soaked atmosphere of a roadside motel and bar. It begins by gliding across polished marble floors past glass displays and digital signage toward a set of elevator doors. As the camera moves through these doors, the environment shifts into a dimly lit private room with wooden floors and a red medical vending machine before abruptly transitioning to a foggy night exterior. The perspective then traverses a cracked asphalt parking lot toward the glowing dome sign of the Sunset Motel, ascending a metal staircase to a covered second-floor walkway. Finally, the camera enters a warmly lit bar interior, where the industrial exterior gives way to a retro space filled with neon bottle signs, band posters, and red bar stools.
